chapter: 第6章：聚合函数与 GROUP BY

problems.title: COUNT 统计行数
problems.description: 统计 students 表中的学生总数。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 COUNT(*) 统计学生总数。
problems.answer: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 学生总数 FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的统计结果

problems.title: SUM 求和
problems.description: 计算 orders 表中所有订单的总金额。

tables.name: orders
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, amount DECIMAL(10,2))

problems.requirement: 使用 SUM(amount) 计算总金额。
problems.answer: SELECT SUM(amount) AS 总金额 FROM orders;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的求和结果

problems.title: AVG 平均值
problems.description: 计算 students 表中学生的平均年龄。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 AVG(age) 计算平均年龄。
problems.answer: SELECT AVG(age) AS 平均年龄 FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的平均值

problems.title: MAX 最大值
problems.description: 查找 students 表中年龄最大的学生的年龄。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 MAX(age) 查找最大年龄。
problems.answer: SELECT MAX(age) AS 最大年龄 FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的最大值

problems.title: MIN 最小值
problems.description: 查找 students 表中年龄最小的学生的年龄。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 MIN(age) 查找最小年龄。
problems.answer: SELECT MIN(age) AS 最小年龄 FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的最小值

problems.title: GROUP BY 分组统计
problems.description: 按性别分组，统计每组的学生人数。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 GROUP BY gender 分组统计。
problems.answer: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS 人数 FROM students GROUP BY gender;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确分组统计

problems.title: GROUP BY 多字段分组
problems.description: 按班级和性别分组，统计每组的学生人数。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class VARCHAR(20), gender VARCHAR(10))

initialData: INSERT INTO students VALUES (1, '张三', '一班', '男')
INSERT INTO students VALUES (2, '李四', '一班', '女')
INSERT INTO students VALUES (3, '王五', '二班', '男')
INSERT INTO students VALUES (4, '赵六', '二班', '女')
problems.requirement: 使用 GROUP BY class, gender 多字段分组。
problems.answer: SELECT class, gender, COUNT(*) AS 人数 FROM students GROUP BY class, gender;
problems.expectedResult: 按班级和性别分组统计
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确多字段分组

problems.title: HAVING 筛选分组
problems.description: 按性别分组，统计人数大于1的组。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 筛选分组。
problems.answer: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS 人数 FROM students GROUP BY gender HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确筛选分组

problems.title: 聚合函数组合使用
problems.description: 按性别分组，统计每组的人数、平均年龄、最大年龄和最小年龄。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 组合使用 COUNT、AVG、MAX、MIN 聚合函数。
problems.answer: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS 人数, AVG(age) AS 平均年龄, MAX(age) AS 最大年龄, MIN(age) AS 最小年龄 FROM students GROUP BY gender;
problems.expectedResult: 返回各组的多个统计信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确组合使用聚合函数

problems.title: 复杂分组查询
problems.description: 查询 orders 表，按用户分组，统计订单数大于1且总金额大于200的用户。

tables.name: orders
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10,2))

problems.requirement: 结合 GROUP BY 和 HAVING，筛选订单数>1且总金额>200的用户。
problems.answer: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS 订单数, SUM(amount) AS 总金额 FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND SUM(amount) > 200;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确筛选分组
